$comment: Serializable catalog of visual templates. Mirrors TemplateRegistry.catalog() in apps/p5-runtime. The bridge + ml-service read this to reason about scenes without importing p5. Keep in sync with src/templates/*. Templates adapted in Phase 4.5 carry hardwareTarget + idioms (the monome control idioms they drive); the 5 legacy templates use the global column-fader mapping and declare neither.

templates.name: Minimal Pulse
templates.description: Concentric rings breathing from the center. Low-CPU demo fallback.

templates.name: Topographic Tunnel
templates.description: Infinite forward tunnel of noise-displaced contour rings. Rhythmic, deep.

templates.name: Grid World
templates.description: A field of cells rippling with activation waves + neighbor connections.

templates.name: Parquet Glitch
templates.description: Parquet deformation of rotating tiles, fractured by glitch slices.

templates.name: Torus Field
templates.description: Rotating wireframe tori + spheres in 3D. Sustained, harmonic, evolving.

templates.name: Lichtspiel — Opus III
templates.description: Ruttmann Opus III film instrument: a morphing forward tunnel inside 2D rectilinear forms, weathered by film grain. The grid64/arc2 hero.

templates.name: Arc + Grid Combo
templates.description: 16-step grid sequencer triggering four arc-driven rotating 3D objects. The Grid 128 / Arc 4 idiom showcase.

templates.name: Pattern Grid World
templates.description: A 3D cube field painted cell-by-cell, flickering and wired with connection lines. The varibright vs monobright showcase.

templates.name: PAS Arc + Grid
templates.description: Four independent 3D wireframe objects tumbling on X/Y/Z; grid faders set each object's rotation frequency, arc encoders scale + regenerate them.

templates.name: UPF AV — Topographic Planes + Tunnel
templates.description: Noise-displaced topographic plane meshes drifting through a forward noise-tunnel; grid faders sculpt the meshes + tunnel, arc encoders scale + regenerate the planes.

templates.name: Arc 4 Shapes + Strobes
templates.description: Orbiting 3D tori/spheres under animated 2D strobe motifs; grid faders set per-motif opacity/gap, arc encoders drive movement/speed/size/rotation.

templates.name: Ito Box — Cube Roulette
templates.description: A velocity-driven roulette cube with per-face colours over a drifting field of low-poly objects; arc encoders are angular-velocity knobs, grid faders shape the background.

templates.name: Parquet Deformation
templates.description: Deforming Perlin meshes + a row of rotating polyhedra; a step sequencer retriggers deformation bursts, arc encoders drive camera zoom/tilt/overlay.

templates.name: PAS Halloween
templates.description: A 2D step-driven element spawner: firing steps birth drifting circle/triangle/square/star shapes over a fading trail backdrop; arc encoders set trail/hue/lifespan/jitter.
